name: Maplebear Inc.
business: Instacart is the leading technology and enablement partner for the grocery industry helping consumers save time, retailers run their businesses online and in-store, and connect brands with customers. It operates Instacart Marketplace, Instacart Enterprise platform, and Instacart Ads. The company enables over 2,200 retail banners and serves over 9,000 active brands as of December 31, 2025.

exposures.sentence: Supporting all of this is AI, which helps us build smarter products, better tools, and more accurate insights across our solutions.
Instacart is the leading technology and enablement partner for the grocery industry helping consumers save time, retailers run their businesses online and in-store, and connect brands with customers.
Fulfillment . We help retailers fulfill grocery orders directly from their stores through a community of dedicated shoppers.
